Bash("E:/Codebase/intraday-trade-assistant/tmp_filter_check2.py" << 'PYEOF'
import json
from collections import Counter, defaultdict

# Detailed comparison: screening detected vs decisions
screening_setups = Counter\(\)
screening_by_setup_and_sym = defaultdict\(set\)
with open\(r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431\\screening.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
            candidates = rec.get\("candidates", []\)
            if isinstance\(candidates, list\):
                for c in candidates:
                    st = c.get\("setup_type", ""\) if isinstance\(c, dict\) else ""
                    if st:
                        screening_setups[st] += 1
                        sym = rec.get\("symbol", c.get\("symbol", ""\)\)
                        screening_by_setup_and_sym[st].add\(sym\)
            structures = rec.get\("structures", []\)
            if isinstance\(structures, list\):
                for s in structures:
                    st = s.get\("setup_type", ""\) if isinstance\(s, dict\) else ""
                    if st:
                        screening_setups[st] += 1
                        sym = rec.get\("symbol", s.get\("symbol", ""\)\)
                        screening_by_setup_and_sym[st].add\(sym\)
            st = rec.get\("setup_type", ""\)
            if st:
                screening_setups[st] += 1
                screening_by_setup_and_sym[st].add\(rec.get\("symbol", ""\)\)
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            continue

# Decisions
decisions_by_setup = Counter\(\)
decisions_by_setup_sym = defaultdict\(set\)
with open\(r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431\\events.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        ev = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
        if ev.get\("type"\) == "DECISION":
            st = \(ev.get\("decision"\) or {}\).get\("setup_type", "unknown"\)
            decisions_by_setup[st] += 1
            decisions_by_setup_sym[st].add\(ev.get\("symbol", ""\)\)

# Now compare
all_setups = sorted\(set\(list\(screening_setups.keys\(\)\) + list\(decisions_by_setup.keys\(\)\)\) - {"unknown"}\)
header = "{:<40} {:>10} {:>10} {:>10}".format\("Setup Type", "Screened", "Decided", "Filtered%"\)
print\(header\)
print\("-" * 75\)
for st in all_setups:
    s = screening_setups.get\(st, 0\)
    d = decisions_by_setup.get\(st, 0\)
    pct = "{:.1f}%".format\(\(1 - d/s\)*100\) if s > 0 else "N/A"
    marker = " <<<" if s > 0 and d == 0 else ""
    print\("{:<40} {:>10} {:>10} {:>10}{}".format\(st, s, d, pct, marker\)\)

print\(\)
print\("SETUPS DETECTED BUT ZERO DECISIONS \(100% filtered\):"\)
for st in all_setups:
    s = screening_setups.get\(st, 0\)
    d = decisions_by_setup.get\(st, 0\)
    if s > 0 and d == 0:
        print\("  {}: {} detections, 0 decisions".format\(st, s\)\)

print\(\)
print\("SETUPS WITH PARTIAL FILTERING:"\)
for st in all_setups:
    s = screening_setups.get\(st, 0\)
    d = decisions_by_setup.get\(st, 0\)
    if s > 0 and d > 0 and d < s:
        print\("  {}: {} detected -> {} decisions \({:.1f}% filtered\)".format\(st, s, d, \(1 - d/s\)*100\)\)

# Check what the screening.jsonl record structure looks like
print\("\\n=== SCREENING.JSONL STRUCTURE SAMPLES ==="\)
with open\(r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431\\screening.jsonl"\) as f:
    for i, line in enumerate\(f\):
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        rec = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
        if i < 3:
            print\("Record {}: keys={}".format\(i, list\(rec.keys\(\)\)\)\)
            print\("  Sample: {}".format\(json.dumps\(rec, default=str\)[:400]\)\)
            print\(\)
PYEOF)

import json
from collections import Counter, defaultdict

# Parse screening.jsonl in detail - looking at reject reasons
screening_actions = Counter\(\)
screening_reasons = Counter\(\)
screening_reasons_by_setup = defaultdict\(Counter\)
setup_filter_blocks = defaultdict\(Counter\)  # setup -> reason -> count

with open\(r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431\\screening.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
            action = rec.get\("action", "unknown"\)
            reason = rec.get\("reason", "unknown"\)
            st = rec.get\("setup_type", "unknown"\)
            all_reasons = rec.get\("all_reasons", []\)
            
            screening_actions[action] += 1
            screening_reasons[reason] += 1
            
            if st != "unknown":
                screening_reasons_by_setup[st][reason] += 1
                for r in all_reasons:
                    if any\(kw in r.lower\(\) for kw in ["regime", "hour", "cap", "filter", "block", "kill", "restrict"]\):
                        setup_filter_blocks[st][r] += 1
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            continue

print\("=== SCREENING ACTIONS ==="\)
for a, cnt in screening_actions.most_common\(\):
    print\("  {}: {}".format\(a, cnt\)\)

print\("\\n=== TOP REJECTION REASONS \(all setups\) ==="\)
for r, cnt in screening_reasons.most_common\(30\):
    print\("  {}: {}".format\(r, cnt\)\)

print\("\\n=== SETUP FILTER BLOCKS \(regime/hour/cap keywords in all_reasons\) ==="\)
if setup_filter_blocks:
    for st in sorted\(setup_filter_blocks\):
        print\("  {}:".format\(st\)\)
        for r, cnt in setup_filter_blocks[st].most_common\(\):
            print\("    {}: {}".format\(r, cnt\)\)
else:
    print\("  NONE FOUND - no regime/hour/cap filter keywords in all_reasons"\)

# Now look at reject reasons for the restricted setups specifically
restricted_setups = [
    "gap_breakout_long", "vwap_reclaim_long", "volume_breakout_long", 
    "breakout_long", "momentum_breakout_long", "vwap_lose_short",
    "gap_fill_short", "gap_fill_long", "failure_fade_long",
    "vwap_mean_reversion_short", "flag_continuation_long",
    "volume_spike_reversal_long", "order_block_long"
]

print\("\\n=== REJECTION REASONS FOR RESTRICTED SETUPS ==="\)
for st in restricted_setups:
    if st in screening_reasons_by_setup:
        print\("\\n  {}:".format\(st\)\)
        for r, cnt in screening_reasons_by_setup[st].most_common\(\):
            print\("    {}: {}".format\(r, cnt\)\)

# Check for 'accept' actions with setup types
print\("\\n=== ACCEPTED SCREENING BY SETUP ==="\)
accept_by_setup = Counter\(\)
with open\(r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431\\screening.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
            if rec.get\("action"\) == "accept":
                st = rec.get\("setup_type", "unknown"\)
                accept_by_setup[st] += 1
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            continue

for st, cnt in accept_by_setup.most_common\(\):
    print\("  {}: {}".format\(st, cnt\)\)
print\("Total accepted: {}".format\(sum\(accept_by_setup.values\(\)\)\)\)
PYEOF)

import json
from collections import Counter, defaultdict

# Parse screening.jsonl: focus on all_reasons for regime/hour/cap filter evidence
setup_filter_blocks = defaultdict\(Counter\)
accept_by_setup = Counter\(\)
reject_by_setup_reason = defaultdict\(Counter\)

with open\(r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431\\screening.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
            st = rec.get\("setup_type", "unknown"\)
            action = rec.get\("action", "unknown"\)
            all_reasons = rec.get\("all_reasons", []\)
            
            if action == "accept" and st != "unknown":
                accept_by_setup[st] += 1
            
            if st != "unknown":
                for r in all_reasons:
                    rl = r.lower\(\)
                    if any\(kw in rl for kw in ["regime", "hour", "cap", "filter", "block", "kill"]\):
                        setup_filter_blocks[st][r] += 1
                    
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            continue

# Parse decisions
decisions_by_setup = Counter\(\)
with open\(r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431\\events.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        ev = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
        if ev.get\("type"\) == "DECISION":
            st = \(ev.get\("decision"\) or {}\).get\("setup_type", "unknown"\)
            decisions_by_setup[st] += 1

# Restricted setups config
restricted = {
    "gap_breakout_long": "blocked_regimes: chop,squeeze,trend_up | blocked_hours: 10,11,13,14 | blocked_caps: micro,mid,small",
    "vwap_reclaim_long": "blocked_regimes: chop,squeeze,trend_up | blocked_hours: 10,11 | blocked_caps: ALL",
    "volume_breakout_long": "blocked_regimes: chop,squeeze,trend_up | blocked_hours: 10,11 | blocked_caps: mid,small,unknown",
    "breakout_long": "blocked_regimes: chop | blocked_hours: 14 | blocked_caps: mid,small",
    "momentum_breakout_long": "blocked_regimes: trend_down,trend_up | blocked_caps: large,mid",
    "first_hour_momentum_short": "blocked_regimes: trend_up | blocked_caps: large",
    "vwap_lose_short": "blocked_regimes: trend_down | blocked_caps: micro",
    "gap_fill_short": "blocked_regimes: trend_down",
    "gap_fill_long": "blocked_regimes: trend_up | blocked_hours: 10 | blocked_caps: mid",
    "order_block_long": "blocked_regimes: trend_up | blocked_hours: 11",
    "failure_fade_long": "blocked_hours: 10",
    "vwap_mean_reversion_short": "blocked_hours: 10",
    "break_of_structure_long": "blocked_caps: small",
    "flag_continuation_long": "blocked_hours: 11",
    "volume_spike_reversal_long": "blocked_caps: large",
}

print\("=" * 90\)
print\("SETUP FILTER VERIFICATION REPORT"\)
print\("Run: run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431"\)
print\("=" * 90\)

print\("\\n--- REGIME/HOUR/CAP FILTER BLOCKS FOUND IN SCREENING ---"\)
for st in sorted\(setup_filter_blocks\):
    print\("\\n  {}:".format\(st\)\)
    for r, cnt in setup_filter_blocks[st].most_common\(\):
        print\("    {} x{}".format\(r, cnt\)\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 90\)
print\("RESTRICTED SETUP DETAIL"\)
print\("=" * 90\)
for setup, rules in restricted.items\(\):
    screened = accept_by_setup.get\(setup, 0\)
    decided = decisions_by_setup.get\(setup, 0\)
    blocks = setup_filter_blocks.get\(setup, Counter\(\)\)
    total_blocks = sum\(blocks.values\(\)\)
    
    print\("\\n  {} [Screened\(accepted\)={}, FilterBlocks={}, Decisions={}]".format\(
        setup, screened, total_blocks, decided\)\)
    print\("    Expected rules: {}".format\(rules\)\)
    if blocks:
        for r, cnt in blocks.most_common\(\):
            print\("    Blocked by: {} x{}".format\(r, cnt\)\)
    else:
        if screened == 0:

        elif decided == 0:

# Check: are there ALL long setups being blocked?

print\("SIDE ANALYSIS: Are ALL long setups blocked?"\)

long_setups = [st for st in accept_by_setup if "_long" in st]
short_setups = [st for st in accept_by_setup if "_short" in st]
print\("\\nLong setups accepted in screening:"\)
for st in sorted\(long_setups\):
    print\("  {}: {} screened, {} decisions".format\(st, accept_by_setup[st], decisions_by_setup.get\(st, 0\)\)\)
print\("\\nShort setups accepted in screening:"\)
for st in sorted\(short_setups\):

for r, cnt in regime_counter.most_common\(\):

# Check ranking.jsonl for filter/block info
print\("\\n" + "=" * 90\)
print\("RANKING.JSONL STRUCTURE"\)
print\("=" * 90\)
with open\(r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431\\ranking.jsonl"\) as f:

        if i < 2:

# Check planning.jsonl
print\("\\n" + "=" * 90\)
print\("PLANNING.JSONL STRUCTURE"\)
print\("=" * 90\)
with open\(r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431\\planning.jsonl"\) as f:
    for i, line in enumerate\(f\):
        if not line.strip\(\): continue

            action = rec.get\("action", ""\)
            print\("  action={}, {}".format\(action, json.dumps\(rec, default=str\)[:400]\)\)

# Count planning actions

Bash("E:/Codebase/intraday-trade-assistant/tmp_filter_gate.py" << 'PYEOF'
import json
from collections import Counter, defaultdict

# Parse planning.jsonl for gate_details containing setup filter info
gate_detail_counter = Counter\(\)
setup_filter_in_gates = defaultdict\(Counter\)
setup_filter_blocks_in_planning = defaultdict\(list\)

with open\(r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431\\planning.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        rec = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
        gate_details = rec.get\("gate_details", []\)
        st = rec.get\("strategy_type", "unknown"\)
        action = rec.get\("action", "unknown"\)
        
        if not isinstance\(gate_details, list\):
            continue
            
        for gd in gate_details:
            if not isinstance\(gd, str\):
                continue
            # Count all gate details
            # Extract the gate name \(before colon or full string\)
            gate_name = gd.split\(":"\)[0] if ":" in gd else gd
            gate_detail_counter[gate_name] += 1
            
            # Look for setup filter keywords
            gdl = gd.lower\(\)
            if any\(kw in gdl for kw in ["setup_filter", "regime_block", "hour_block", "cap_block", 
                                          "kill_filter", "blocked", "no_setup_filter"]\):
                setup_filter_in_gates[st][gd] += 1

print\("=== TOP GATE DETAIL TYPES \(planning.jsonl\) ==="\)
for gd, cnt in gate_detail_counter.most_common\(40\):
    print\("  {}: {}".format\(gd, cnt\)\)

print\("\\n=== SETUP FILTER GATES BY SETUP TYPE ==="\)
if setup_filter_in_gates:
    for st in sorted\(setup_filter_in_gates\):
        print\("\\n  {}:".format\(st\)\)
        for gd, cnt in setup_filter_in_gates[st].most_common\(\):
            print\("    {} x{}".format\(gd, cnt\)\)
else:
    print\("  NONE FOUND"\)

# Now count gate_fail reasons per setup for restricted setups
restricted_setups = [
    "gap_breakout_long", "vwap_reclaim_long", "volume_breakout_long", 
    "breakout_long", "momentum_breakout_long", "vwap_lose_short",
    "gap_fill_short", "gap_fill_long", "failure_fade_long",
    "vwap_mean_reversion_short", "flag_continuation_long",
    "volume_spike_reversal_long", "order_block_long",
    "discount_zone_long", "range_bounce_long", "support_bounce_long",
    "orb_breakout_long", "orb_pullback_long"
]

print\("\\n=== PLANNING GATE DETAILS FOR KEY SETUPS ==="\)
planning_gate_by_setup = defaultdict\(Counter\)
planning_action_by_setup = Counter\(\)
with open\(r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431\\planning.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        rec = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
        st = rec.get\("strategy_type", "unknown"\)
        action = rec.get\("action", "unknown"\)
        reason = rec.get\("reason", "unknown"\)
        gate_details = rec.get\("gate_details", []\)
        
        if st in restricted_setups:
            planning_action_by_setup["{}:{}:{}".format\(st, action, reason\)] += 1
            if isinstance\(gate_details, list\):
                for gd in gate_details:
                    if isinstance\(gd, str\):
                        planning_gate_by_setup[st][gd] += 1

for st in restricted_setups:
    if st in planning_gate_by_setup:
        # Count accept vs reject
        accepts = sum\(v for k, v in planning_action_by_setup.items\(\) if k.startswith\(st + ":accept"\)\)
        rejects = sum\(v for k, v in planning_action_by_setup.items\(\) if k.startswith\(st + ":reject"\)\)
        print\("\\n  {} [planning accept={}, reject={}]:".format\(st, accepts, rejects\)\)
        for gd, cnt in planning_gate_by_setup[st].most_common\(10\):
            print\("    {} x{}".format\(gd, cnt\)\)
    else:
        print\("\\n  {}: not found in planning.jsonl".format\(st\)\)
PYEOF)

Bash("E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\temp_analysis.py" << 'PYEOF'
import json
from collections import Counter, defaultdict

run = r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431"

# 1. Parse all events
decisions = []
triggers = []
exits = []
with open\(f"{run}/events.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        ev = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
        if ev["type"] == "DECISION":
            decisions.append\(ev\)
        elif ev["type"] == "TRIGGER":
            triggers.append\(ev\)
        elif ev["type"] == "EXIT":
            exits.append\(ev\)

print\(f"Pipeline: {len\(decisions\)} decisions -> {len\(triggers\)} triggers -> {len\(exits\)} exits"\)
print\(\)

# 2. Decision breakdown by setup and hour
setup_counts = Counter\(\)
setup_hour = defaultdict\(Counter\)
setup_symbols = defaultdict\(set\)
for d in decisions:
    dec = d.get\("decision", {}\)
    st = dec.get\("setup_type", "unknown"\)
    setup_counts[st] += 1
    setup_symbols[st].add\(d.get\("symbol", ""\)\)
    ts = d.get\("ts", ""\)
    if ts and len\(ts\) >= 13:
        hour = ts[11:13]
        setup_hour[st][hour] += 1

print\("=== DECISIONS BY SETUP ==="\)
for st, cnt in setup_counts.most_common\(\):
    n_syms = len\(setup_symbols[st]\)
    hours = dict\(setup_hour[st].most_common\(\)\)
    print\(f"  {st}: {cnt} decisions \({n_syms} symbols\)"\)
    print\(f"    Hours: {hours}"\)

# 3. Same symbol appearing multiple times?
symbol_decisions = Counter\(\)
for d in decisions:
    symbol_decisions[d.get\("symbol", ""\)] += 1

print\(f"\\n=== SYMBOL REPETITION ==="\)
print\(f"  Unique symbols: {len\(symbol_decisions\)}"\)
print\(f"  Avg decisions/symbol: {sum\(symbol_decisions.values\(\)\)/max\(len\(symbol_decisions\),1\):.1f}"\)
print\(f"  Top 10 most-decided symbols:"\)
for sym, cnt in symbol_decisions.most_common\(10\):
    # Which setups for this symbol?
    sym_setups = Counter\(\)
    for d in decisions:
        if d.get\("symbol"\) == sym:
            sym_setups[\(d.get\("decision",{}\).get\("setup_type",""\)\)] += 1
    print\(f"    {sym}: {cnt} decisions â€” {dict\(sym_setups\)}"\)

# 4. Trigger conversion rate per setup
trigger_setups = Counter\(\)
for t in triggers:
    trigger_setups[t.get\("trigger", {}\).get\("strategy", "unknown"\)] += 1

print\(f"\\n=== TRIGGER CONVERSION ==="\)
for st in setup_counts:
    trig = trigger_setups.get\(st, 0\)
    dec = setup_counts[st]
    rate = trig/dec*100 if dec > 0 else 0
    print\(f"  {st}: {dec} dec -> {trig} trig \({rate:.0f}%\)"\)

# 5. Exit PnL by setup
exit_pnl = defaultdict\(list\)
for e in exits:
    ex = e.get\("exit", {}\)
    pnl = ex.get\("pnl"\)
    # Find the trigger for this trade to get setup type
    tid = e.get\("trade_id", ""\)
    for t in triggers:
        if t.get\("trade_id"\) == tid:
            st = t.get\("trigger", {}\).get\("strategy", "unknown"\)
            if pnl is not None:
                exit_pnl[st].append\(pnl\)
            break

print\(f"\\n=== EXIT PnL BY SETUP ==="\)
for st, pnls in sorted\(exit_pnl.items\(\), key=lambda x: sum\(x[1]\), reverse=True\):
    total = sum\(pnls\)
    avg = total / len\(pnls\) if pnls else 0
    wins = sum\(1 for p in pnls if p > 0\)
    wr = wins/len\(pnls\)*100 if pnls else 0
    print\(f"  {st}: {len\(pnls\)} trades | WR {wr:.0f}% | Total Rs {total:.0f} | Avg Rs {avg:.0f}"\)

# 6. Check rank_score and quality distributions for decisions
rank_scores = []
structural_rrs = []
for d in decisions:
    plan = d.get\("plan", {}\)
    # Try to get rank from features or plan
    features = d.get\("features", {}\)
    rs = features.get\("rank_score"\) or plan.get\("rank_score"\)
    if rs is not None:
        try:
            rank_scores.append\(float\(rs\)\)
        except: pass
    srr = plan.get\("structural_rr"\)
    if srr is not None:
        try:
            structural_rrs.append\(float\(srr\)\)
        except: pass

if rank_scores:
    import statistics
    print\(f"\\n=== RANK SCORE DISTRIBUTION ==="\)
    print\(f"  N={len\(rank_scores\)} | Min={min\(rank_scores\):.2f} | Median={statistics.median\(rank_scores\):.2f} | Mean={statistics.mean\(rank_scores\):.2f} | Max={max\(rank_scores\):.2f}"\)
    # Quintile breakdown
    rank_scores.sort\(\)
    q_size = len\(rank_scores\) // 5
    for i in range\(5\):
        start = i * q_size
        end = \(i+1\) * q_size if i < 4 else len\(rank_scores\)
        q = rank_scores[start:end]
        print\(f"  Q{i+1}: [{q[0]:.2f} - {q[-1]:.2f}] \({len\(q\)} trades\)"\)

if structural_rrs:
    import statistics
    print\(f"\\n=== STRUCTURAL RR DISTRIBUTION ==="\)
    print\(f"  N={len\(structural_rrs\)} | Min={min\(structural_rrs\):.2f} | Median={statistics.median\(structural_rrs\):.2f} | Mean={statistics.mean\(structural_rrs\):.2f} | Max={max\(structural_rrs\):.2f}"\)

# 7. Planning stage - how many candidates vs how many planned
planning_total = 0
planning_accepted = 0  
planning_rejected = 0
planning_reject_reasons = Counter\(\)
try:
    with open\(f"{run}/planning.jsonl"\) as f:
        for line in f:
            if not line.strip\(\): continue
            rec = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
            planning_total += 1
            status = rec.get\("status", ""\)
            if status == "accepted" or rec.get\("accepted"\):
                planning_accepted += 1
            else:
                planning_rejected += 1
                # Get rejection reason
                gate_details = rec.get\("gate_details", {}\)
                if isinstance\(gate_details, dict\):
                    for k, v in gate_details.items\(\):
                        if v == False or \(isinstance\(v, str\) and "fail" in v.lower\(\)\):
                            planning_reject_reasons[k] += 1
                        elif isinstance\(v, str\) and "block" in v.lower\(\):
                            planning_reject_reasons[v] += 1
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"Planning error: {e}"\)

print\(f"\\n=== PLANNING FUNNEL ==="\)
print\(f"  Total planning evaluations: {planning_total}"\)
print\(f"  Accepted: {planning_accepted}"\)
print\(f"  Rejected: {planning_rejected}"\)
if planning_reject_reasons:
    print\(f"  Top rejection reasons:"\)
    for r, cnt in planning_reject_reasons.most_common\(20\):
        print\(f"    {r}: {cnt}"\)

# 8. Screening volume per 5m bar
screening_times = Counter\(\)
try:
    with open\(f"{run}/screening.jsonl"\) as f:
        for line in f:
            if not line.strip\(\): continue
            rec = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
            ts = rec.get\("ts", ""\)
            if ts and len\(ts\) >= 16:
                screening_times[ts[:16]] += 1  # Group by minute
except: pass

if screening_times:
    # Group by 5m windows
    bar_counts = Counter\(\)
    for ts, cnt in screening_times.items\(\):
        hour_min = ts[11:16]  # HH:MM
        bar_counts[hour_min] += cnt
    
    print\(f"\\n=== SCREENING VOLUME \(top 15 busiest minutes\) ==="\)
    for ts, cnt in bar_counts.most_common\(15\):
        print\(f"  {ts}: {cnt} screenings"\)
PYEOF)

Bash("E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431\\_analysis_temp.py" << 'PYEOF'
import json
from collections import Counter, defaultdict
import statistics

run = r"E:\\Codebase\\intraday-trade-assistant\\logs\\run_c07f6d6b_20260213_152431"

# Parse planning.jsonl to understand the FULL funnel
planning_data = []
with open\(f"{run}/planning.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
            planning_data.append\(rec\)
        except: continue

print\(f"=== PLANNING.JSONL: {len\(planning_data\)} entries ==="\)
# Show first record's keys to understand structure
if planning_data:
    sample = planning_data[0]
    print\(f"  Keys: {list\(sample.keys\(\)\)}"\)
    # Show a few key fields
    for key in ["setup_type", "status", "accepted", "gate_result", "gate_details", "rejected_reason"]:
        if key in sample:
            print\(f"  {key}: {sample[key]}"\)
    
    # Count by status/result
    statuses = Counter\(\)
    for rec in planning_data:
        # Try different status fields
        st = rec.get\("status"\) or rec.get\("gate_result"\) or rec.get\("result"\) or "unknown"
        statuses[str\(st\)] += 1
    print\(f"\\n  Status distribution: {dict\(statuses.most_common\(\)\)}"\)

# Parse DECISION events with all available quality metrics
decisions = []
with open\(f"{run}/events.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        ev = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
        if ev.get\("type"\) == "DECISION":
            decisions.append\(ev\)

print\(f"\\n=== DECISION QUALITY ANALYSIS \({len\(decisions\)} decisions\) ==="\)

# Extract quality features from decisions
quality_data = []
for d in decisions:
    plan = d.get\("plan", {}\)
    dec = d.get\("decision", {}\)
    bar5 = d.get\("bar5", {}\)
    features = d.get\("features", {}\)
    
    entry = {
        "setup_type": dec.get\("setup_type", ""\),
        "symbol": d.get\("symbol", ""\),
        "ts": d.get\("ts", ""\),
        "rank_score": None,
        "structural_rr": None,
        "quality": None,
        "adx": None,
        "volume": None,
        "t1_rr": None,
    }
    
    # Try multiple paths for rank_score
    for path in [
        lambda: plan.get\("rank_score"\),
        lambda: features.get\("rank_score"\),
        lambda: plan.get\("ranking", {}\).get\("score"\),
        lambda: plan.get\("ranking", {}\).get\("rank_score"\),
    ]:
        try:
            v = path\(\)
            if v is not None:
                entry["rank_score"] = float\(v\)
                break
        except: pass
    
    # structural_rr
    for path in [
        lambda: plan.get\("structural_rr"\),
        lambda: plan.get\("quality", {}\).get\("structural_rr"\),
        lambda: dec.get\("structural_rr"\),
    ]:
        try:
            v = path\(\)
            if v is not None:
                entry["structural_rr"] = float\(v\)
                break
        except: pass
    
    # quality score
    for path in [
        lambda: plan.get\("quality"\),
        lambda: plan.get\("quality_score"\),
        lambda: dec.get\("quality"\),
    ]:
        try:
            v = path\(\)
            if v is not None and not isinstance\(v, dict\):
                entry["quality"] = float\(v\)
                break
        except: pass
    
    # ADX
    try:
        entry["adx"] = float\(bar5.get\("adx"\) or features.get\("adx"\) or 0\)
    except: pass
    
    # t1_rr
    try:
        targets = plan.get\("targets", []\)
        if targets and isinstance\(targets, list\) and len\(targets\) > 0:
            t1 = targets[0]
            if isinstance\(t1, dict\):
                entry["t1_rr"] = float\(t1.get\("rr", 0\)\)
    except: pass
    
    quality_data.append\(entry\)

# Analyze distributions
for field in ["rank_score", "structural_rr", "quality", "adx", "t1_rr"]:
    values = [d[field] for d in quality_data if d[field] is not None and d[field] > 0]
    if values:
        values.sort\(\)
        print\(f"\\n  {field}: N={len\(values\)}"\)
        print\(f"    Min={min\(values\):.2f} | P25={values[len\(values\)//4]:.2f} | Median={statistics.median\(values\):.2f} | P75={values[3*len\(values\)//4]:.2f} | Max={max\(values\):.2f}"\)

# How many unique symbols per setup?
setup_sym_count = defaultdict\(set\)
for d in quality_data:
    setup_sym_count[d["setup_type"]].add\(d["symbol"]\)

print\(f"\\n=== SYMBOLS PER SETUP ==="\)
for st, syms in sorted\(setup_sym_count.items\(\), key=lambda x: -len\(x[1]\)\):
    print\(f"  {st}: {len\(syms\)} unique symbols"\)

# Hour distribution of decisions
hour_dist = Counter\(\)
for d in quality_data:
    ts = d.get\("ts", ""\)
    if ts and len\(ts\) >= 13:
        hour_dist[int\(ts[11:13]\)] += 1
print\(f"\\n=== DECISIONS BY HOUR ==="\)
for h in sorted\(hour_dist\):
    print\(f"  Hour {h}: {hour_dist[h]} decisions"\)

# What's happening with triggers -> exits?
triggers = []
trigger_map = {}  # trade_id -> trigger
with open\(f"{run}/events.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        ev = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
        if ev.get\("type"\) == "TRIGGER":
            triggers.append\(ev\)
            trigger_map[ev.get\("trade_id", ""\)] = ev
        elif ev.get\("type"\) == "EXIT":
            tid = ev.get\("trade_id", ""\)
            ex = ev.get\("exit", {}\)
            pnl = ex.get\("pnl"\)
            reason = ex.get\("reason", ""\)
            t = trigger_map.get\(tid\)
            strat = t.get\("trigger", {}\).get\("strategy", "unknown"\) if t else "unknown"

exits = []
with open\(f"{run}/events.jsonl"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if not line.strip\(\): continue
        ev = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)
        if ev.get\("type"\) == "EXIT":
            exits.append\(ev\)

print\(f"\\n=== EXIT ANALYSIS \({len\(exits\)} exits\) ==="\)
exit_reasons = Counter\(\)
exit_pnl_by_reason = defaultdict\(list\)
total_pnl = 0
for e in exits:
    ex = e.get\("exit", {}\)
    reason = ex.get\("reason", "unknown"\)
    pnl = ex.get\("pnl"\)
    if pnl is not None:
        total_pnl += pnl
        exit_pnl_by_reason[reason].append\(pnl\)
    exit_reasons[reason] += 1

for reason, cnt in exit_reasons.most_common\(\):
    pnls = exit_pnl_by_reason.get\(reason, []\)
    if pnls:
        avg = sum\(pnls\)/len\(pnls\)
        total = sum\(pnls\)
        wr = sum\(1 for p in pnls if p > 0\) / len\(pnls\) * 100
        print\(f"  {reason}: {cnt} exits | WR {wr:.0f}% | Total Rs {total:.0f} | Avg Rs {avg:.0f}"\)
    else:
        print\(f"  {reason}: {cnt} exits | no PnL data"\)

print\(f"\\n  NET PnL: Rs {total_pnl:.0f}"\)

# Per-setup PnL \(using trigger trade_ids matched to exits\)
setup_pnl = defaultdict\(list\)
for e in exits:
    tid = e.get\("trade_id", ""\)
    pnl = e.get\("exit", {}\).get\("pnl"\)
    t = trigger_map.get\(tid\)
    if t and pnl is not None:
        strat = t.get\("trigger", {}\).get\("strategy", "unknown"\)
        setup_pnl[strat].append\(pnl\)

print\(f"\\n=== PnL BY SETUP ==="\)
for st, pnls in sorted\(setup_pnl.items\(\), key=lambda x: -sum\(x[1]\)\):
    total = sum\(pnls\)
    avg = total/len\(pnls\) if pnls else 0
    wr = sum\(1 for p in pnls if p > 0\)/len\(pnls\)*100 if pnls else 0
    print\(f"  {st}: {len\(pnls\)} trades | WR {wr:.0f}% | Total Rs {total:.0f} | Avg Rs {avg:.0f}"\)

# How many positions were held simultaneously \(max\)
# Look at timestamps of triggers and exits
trigger_times = []
exit_times = []
for t in triggers:
    ts = t.get\("ts", ""\)
    if ts:
        trigger_times.append\(ts\)
for e in exits:
    ts = e.get\("ts", ""\)
    if ts:
        exit_times.append\(ts\)

print\(f"\\n=== POSITION TIMING ==="\)
if trigger_times:
    print\(f"  First trigger: {min\(trigger_times\)}"\)
    print\(f"  Last trigger: {max\(trigger_times\)}"\)
if exit_times:
    print\(f"  First exit: {min\(exit_times\)}"\)
    print\(f"  Last exit: {max\(exit_times\)}"\)
PYEOF)
